impact.social: Faster diagnosis means earlier effective treatment and lives saved.
impact.economic: Reduces broad-spectrum overuse and shortens costly hospital stays.
impact.environmental: Targeted treatment reduces antibiotic overuse driving resistance.
impact.technological: Advances rapid pathogen ID and susceptibility analysis.

projects.name: BlazeCast
projects.shortDescription: When wildfires ignite, agencies struggle to predict spread and plan evacuations fast enough. BlazeCast simulates wildfire spread in real time and models evacuation to guide response and protect communities. Target market: fire agencies, emergency managers, and land managers.

impact.social: Faster, smarter evacuation and response saves lives.
impact.economic: Better prediction reduces wildfire damage and suppression costs.
impact.environmental: Improved response limits fire emissions and habitat loss.
impact.technological: Advances real-time wildfire spread and evacuation modeling.

projects.name: BinPick
projects.shortDescription: Robots still struggle to reliably grasp jumbled, varied items from bins, blocking warehouse and manufacturing automation. BinPick provides perception and grasp planning for robust robotic bin picking of arbitrary objects. Target market: warehouse automation, manufacturing, and robotics integrators.
features: Perception of cluttered, varied objects in bins
Robust grasp planning for arbitrary shapes
Handling of reflective and deformable items
Adaptation to new SKUs without reprogramming

impact.social: Removes repetitive strain tasks and addresses labor shortages.
impact.economic: Unlocks automation of picking, a major manual cost.
impact.environmental: Efficient handling reduces damage and waste.
impact.technological: Advances robotic bin-picking perception and grasping.

projects.name: BioCircuit
projects.shortDescription: Engineering microbes to make medicines, materials, and fuels is slow because designing reliable genetic circuits is hard. BioCircuit designs and simulates synthetic-biology genetic circuits to engineer organisms predictably. Target market: synthetic-biology companies, biomanufacturing, and research labs.

impact.social: Accelerates bio-based medicines, materials, and fuels.
impact.economic: Predictable design compresses costly design-build-test cycles.
impact.environmental: Bio-manufacturing can replace polluting chemical processes.
impact.technological: Advances synthetic-biology circuit design.

projects.name: EchoGuide
projects.shortDescription: Portable ultrasound could expand care, but non-experts can't capture or interpret good images. EchoGuide guides non-experts to capture and interpret point-of-care ultrasound with real-time feedback. Target market: primary care, emergency, rural clinics, and ultrasound-device makers.
features: Quality feedback to get diagnostic views

impact.social: Extends diagnostic imaging to underserved and remote settings.
impact.economic: Earlier point-of-care diagnosis reduces referrals and delays.
impact.environmental: Reduces travel for imaging.
impact.technological: Advances guided point-of-care ultrasound.

projects.name: DistrictHeat
projects.shortDescription: District heating networks waste energy and money because they're operated without continuous, network-wide optimization. DistrictHeat optimizes district heating and cooling networks for efficiency, cost, and low-carbon sources. Target market: district-energy utilities and municipalities.

impact.social: Delivers affordable, reliable heating to communities.
impact.economic: Network optimization cuts fuel and operating costs.
impact.environmental: Integrating waste heat and renewables decarbonizes heating.
impact.technological: Advances district-energy network optimization.

projects.name: SeismaFit
projects.shortDescription: Millions of buildings are seismically vulnerable, but retrofit design is slow, costly, and inconsistent. SeismaFit optimizes seismic-retrofit design to maximize safety per dollar for vulnerable buildings. Target market: structural engineers, building owners, and governments.

impact.social: Saves lives by making vulnerable buildings earthquake-safer.
impact.economic: Optimizing safety-per-dollar stretches limited retrofit budgets.
impact.environmental: Retrofitting extends building life versus demolition/rebuild.
impact.technological: Advances seismic-retrofit design optimization.

projects.name: CryoFold
projects.shortDescription: Cryo-electron microscopy reveals protein structures vital for drug discovery, but processing the data is slow and expertise-bound. CryoFold accelerates cryo-EM image processing and structure determination. Target market: structural-biology labs, pharma, and research institutions.
features: Accelerated cryo-EM particle picking and classification

impact.social: Speeds understanding of biology underlying disease.
impact.economic: Faster structure determination accelerates drug discovery.
impact.environmental: Compute efficiency reduces energy per structure.
impact.technological: Advances cryo-EM data processing.

projects.name: NowCast
projects.shortDescription: Sudden heavy rain causes floods and disruption that standard forecasts miss at the local, near-term scale. NowCast provides high-resolution short-term precipitation nowcasting from radar and satellite for the next hours. Target market: weather services, cities, utilities, and event operators.

impact.social: Short-term warnings help people and operations avoid harm.
impact.economic: Reduces weather-driven disruption and damage costs.
impact.environmental: Supports climate-adaptation and water management.
impact.technological: Advances high-resolution precipitation nowcasting.

projects.name: OreOpt
projects.shortDescription: Mineral processing wastes energy and loses recoverable metal because complex plants are tuned manually. OreOpt optimizes mineral-processing operations (grinding, flotation) for recovery and energy efficiency. Target market: mining and mineral-processing operators.

impact.social: More efficient mineral supply for the energy transition.
impact.economic: Recovery and energy gains are large at processing scale.
impact.environmental: Higher recovery and lower energy reduce waste and emissions per ton.
impact.technological: Advances mineral-processing optimization.

projects.name: SoilCarbon
projects.shortDescription: Soil-carbon credits could reward regenerative farming, but measuring and verifying soil carbon is hard and costly. SoilCarbon measures, models, and verifies soil-carbon changes to support credible agricultural carbon credits. Target market: regenerative-ag programs, carbon registries, and farmers.

impact.social: Rewards farmers for climate-friendly practices.
impact.economic: Credible credits create new farm revenue streams.
impact.environmental: Supports soil-carbon sequestration and healthier soils.
impact.technological: Advances soil-carbon MRV.

projects.name: DataForge
projects.shortDescription: ML projects stall on the cost and effort of labeling data and the scarcity of edge-case examples. DataForge automates data labeling and generates synthetic data to train robust models faster. Target market: ML teams, autonomous-systems developers, and data-science organizations.
features: Synthetic data generation for rare cases
Active-learning to label what matters most
Quality assurance on labels and synthetic data

impact.social: Enables safer, more capable AI systems faster.
impact.economic: Cuts the dominant cost of ML projects: data labeling.
impact.environmental: Synthetic data reduces costly real-world data collection.
impact.technological: Advances automated labeling and synthetic data.

projects.name: GridPlan
projects.shortDescription: Planning the future grid—where to build generation, storage, and transmission—is a staggering optimization under deep uncertainty. GridPlan models capacity expansion and grid planning to guide low-cost, reliable decarbonization. Target market: utilities, grid operators, and energy planners.

impact.social: Guides reliable, affordable clean-energy transitions for regions.
impact.economic: Optimized planning avoids stranded and over-built infrastructure.
impact.environmental: Charts least-cost paths to deep decarbonization.
impact.technological: Advances grid capacity-expansion modeling.

projects.name: FermentAI
projects.shortDescription: Biomanufacturing yields suffer because fermentation and bioreactor processes are sensitive and hard to control optimally. FermentAI optimizes fermentation and bioreactor operation for yield, consistency, and cost. Target market: biomanufacturers, food-tech, and pharma fermentation operations.
features: Soft sensors for key bioprocess variables
Scale-up support from lab to production

impact.social: Improves production of bio-based foods, materials, and medicines.
impact.economic: Yield and consistency gains materially improve bioprocess economics.
impact.environmental: Efficient fermentation reduces resource and energy use.
impact.technological: Advances bioprocess optimization.

projects.name: RoadSense
projects.shortDescription: Road agencies discover potholes and pavement failures reactively, leading to costly repairs and unsafe roads. RoadSense assesses road and pavement condition from vehicle-mounted cameras to prioritize maintenance. Target market: road authorities, municipalities, and fleet operators.
features: Maintenance prioritization by risk and cost

impact.social: Safer roads and fewer vehicle-damaging hazards.
impact.economic: Proactive maintenance is far cheaper than reactive repair.
impact.environmental: Smoother roads reduce fuel use; targeted repair cuts material waste.
impact.technological: Advances automated pavement-condition assessment.

projects.name: MediDrone
projects.shortDescription: Remote and underserved areas lack timely access to blood, vaccines, and urgent medical supplies. MediDrone plans and operates autonomous medical-delivery drone networks for time-critical health logistics. Target market: health systems, governments, and humanitarian organizations.

impact.social: Delivers life-saving supplies to hard-to-reach communities fast.
impact.economic: Reduces wastage and stockouts and the cost of ground logistics.
impact.environmental: Drone delivery can cut emissions versus vehicle trips.
impact.technological: Advances autonomous medical-delivery logistics.

projects.name: SpeechPal
projects.shortDescription: People needing speech therapy get limited clinician time and struggle to practice correctly at home. SpeechPal guides at-home speech-therapy practice with real-time feedback between clinician sessions. Target market: speech-language pathologists, children and adults in therapy, and clinics.

impact.social: Extends effective speech therapy beyond limited clinic time.
impact.economic: More practice improves outcomes and clinical efficiency.
impact.environmental: Reduces travel for routine practice.
impact.technological: Advances speech-therapy feedback systems.

projects.name: CementMix
projects.shortDescription: Cement and concrete cause roughly 8% of global CO2, yet low-carbon mixes are hard to design without sacrificing performance. CementMix optimizes concrete mix design to cut embodied carbon while meeting strength and durability. Target market: concrete producers, construction firms, and material engineers.
features: Cost vs carbon vs performance trade-offs

impact.social: Decarbonizes a ubiquitous, hard-to-abate material.
impact.economic: Optimized mixes can cut material cost and meet carbon mandates.
impact.environmental: Reduces cement's large CO2 footprint per project.
impact.technological: Advances low-carbon concrete mix design.

projects.name: AquaFarm
projects.shortDescription: Aquaculture is the fastest-growing food sector but suffers disease, poor feed efficiency, and environmental harm. AquaFarm monitors fish health and optimizes feeding and conditions for sustainable aquaculture. Target market: fish farms, aquaculture operators, and feed companies.
features: Feed optimization to cut waste and cost

impact.social: Supports sustainable protein supply for a growing population.
impact.economic: Feed and disease optimization improve yields and margins.
impact.environmental: Less feed waste and better monitoring reduce aquaculture's footprint.
impact.technological: Advances aquaculture monitoring and optimization.

projects.name: NeuroScan
projects.shortDescription: Neurodegenerative diseases like Parkinson's and dementia are detected late, when intervention is hardest. NeuroScan screens for early signs from speech, movement, and behavior to flag people for clinical evaluation. Target market: health systems, researchers, and at-risk populations.
features: Early-sign detection from speech and movement
Risk flagging for clinical referral (not diagnosis)

impact.social: Earlier detection enables earlier support and planning.
impact.economic: Early identification can reduce downstream care costs.
impact.environmental: Negligible direct footprint.
impact.technological: Advances digital biomarkers for neurodegenerative screening.

projects.name: AeroTwin
projects.shortDescription: Aircraft maintenance is schedule-driven and conservative, grounding planes unnecessarily or risking in-service issues. AeroTwin builds digital twins of aircraft engines and systems to predict maintenance needs precisely. Target market: airlines, MRO providers, and aircraft/engine OEMs.

impact.social: Improves aircraft safety and reduces delays for travelers.
impact.economic: Condition-based maintenance cuts unnecessary grounding and AOG cost.
impact.environmental: Optimized maintenance supports efficient, lower-emission operation.
impact.technological: Advances aircraft digital twins and prognostics.

projects.name: AutoLab
projects.shortDescription: Scientific discovery is bottlenecked by slow, manual experimentation that can't explore vast possibility spaces. AutoLab orchestrates self-driving labs that plan, run, and learn from experiments autonomously. Target market: research institutions, pharma/materials R&D, and contract labs.

impact.social: Accelerates discovery of medicines, materials, and clean tech.
impact.economic: Self-driving labs compress discovery time and cost dramatically.
impact.environmental: Efficient experimentation reduces reagent and energy waste.
impact.technological: Advances autonomous experimentation.

projects.name: SpectrumGuard
projects.shortDescription: Wireless spectrum is increasingly congested and vulnerable to interference and jamming that disrupt critical services. SpectrumGuard monitors radio spectrum to detect, localize, and mitigate interference and unauthorized use. Target market: regulators, telecom operators, and critical-infrastructure users.

impact.social: Protects connectivity that critical services and people depend on.
impact.economic: Reduces costly interference-driven outages and inefficiency.
impact.environmental: Negligible direct footprint.
impact.technological: Advances spectrum monitoring and interference mitigation.

projects.name: HydroOpt
projects.shortDescription: Hydropower operators must balance electricity value, water supply, flood control, and ecology with crude scheduling. HydroOpt optimizes reservoir and cascade operations across competing objectives and forecasts. Target market: hydropower operators, water authorities, and grid operators.

impact.social: Balances clean power with water supply and flood safety for communities.
impact.economic: Optimized operations increase the value extracted from hydro assets.
impact.environmental: Respects environmental flows while maximizing clean generation.
impact.technological: Advances multi-objective hydropower optimization.

projects.name: PackWise
projects.shortDescription: Packaging drives enormous material waste and shipping emissions because it's over-designed and poorly right-sized. PackWise optimizes packaging design and right-sizing to cut material, waste, and shipping cost. Target market: manufacturers, e-commerce, and packaging engineers.
features: Packaging design optimization for material reduction

impact.social: Reduces the packaging waste consumers increasingly reject.
impact.economic: Right-sizing cuts material and shipping costs significantly.
impact.environmental: Less material and better fill rates cut waste and shipping emissions.
impact.technological: Advances packaging design optimization.

projects.name: LimbSense
projects.shortDescription: Prosthetic limbs are hard to control intuitively, so many users abandon them. LimbSense decodes muscle and nerve signals to give prosthetic users natural, intuitive control. Target market: prosthetics developers, rehabilitation clinics, and amputees.
features: Robust signal handling during daily use

impact.social: Restores natural function and independence to amputees.
impact.economic: Better control reduces abandonment of costly prosthetics.
impact.environmental: Negligible direct footprint.
impact.technological: Advances intuitive prosthetic control.

projects.name: FabFlow
projects.shortDescription: Semiconductor fabs lose throughput and yield to complex scheduling of thousands of process steps across costly tools. FabFlow optimizes fab production scheduling and dispatch to raise throughput and cut cycle time. Target market: semiconductor fabs and advanced manufacturers.

impact.social: Supports reliable supply of critical semiconductors.
impact.economic: Throughput and cycle-time gains are highly valuable at fab scale.
impact.environmental: Higher efficiency reduces energy and waste per chip.
impact.technological: Advances semiconductor fab scheduling.

projects.name: AirSense
projects.shortDescription: Poor indoor air quality harms health and productivity in homes, schools, and offices, mostly invisibly. AirSense monitors indoor air quality and optimizes ventilation to protect health while saving energy. Target market: building operators, schools, and workplaces.
features: Ventilation optimization balancing health and energy

impact.social: Protects health and cognition where people spend most of their time.
impact.economic: Better air quality improves productivity and reduces sick days.
impact.environmental: Optimized ventilation cuts energy versus over-ventilation.
impact.technological: Advances indoor air-quality and ventilation control.

projects.name: FishCount
projects.shortDescription: Overfishing and poor stock data threaten fisheries and food security because wild-stock assessment is sparse and slow. FishCount estimates fish-stock abundance from sonar and acoustic data to support sustainable fisheries management. Target market: fisheries agencies, researchers, and fishing cooperatives.
features: Fish-stock abundance estimation from acoustic data

impact.social: Supports food security and fishing livelihoods sustainably.
impact.economic: Better stock data enables sustainable, profitable quotas.
impact.environmental: Helps prevent overfishing and protect marine ecosystems.
impact.technological: Advances acoustic fish-stock assessment.

projects.name: PharmGene
projects.shortDescription: Patients receive medications that won't work or cause harm because their genetic differences in drug response are ignored. PharmGene analyzes pharmacogenomic data to guide safer, more effective medication choices. Target market: health systems, clinicians, and diagnostics providers.
features: Result integration into the patient record

impact.social: Reduces harmful and ineffective prescribing through precision medicine.
impact.economic: Avoids adverse events and wasted ineffective treatments.
impact.environmental: Negligible direct footprint.
impact.technological: Advances pharmacogenomic clinical decision support.

projects.name: ThermAudit
projects.shortDescription: Buildings leak energy through invisible thermal weaknesses that manual audits rarely catch at scale. ThermAudit uses thermal imaging and modeling to pinpoint building heat loss and prioritize efficiency fixes. Target market: energy auditors, building owners, and retrofit programs.

impact.social: Improves comfort and lowers energy bills for occupants.
impact.economic: Targets the highest-ROI efficiency fixes, cutting energy spend.
impact.environmental: Reducing heat loss directly cuts building emissions.
impact.technological: Advances thermal building diagnostics.
